news_items.headline: Electric -- and partly shirtless! -- Busch Stadium atmosphere fuels Cards' walk-off
Holmes sustains fractured fibula on 111.1 mph comebacker
Mets' Juan Soto playing through discomfort as he smashes 250th home run
news_items.summary: Juan Soto grimaced during a swing and miss in Friday's loss to the Yankees, but the Mets slugger pushed past the pain to smash his 250th career home run.

news_items.headline: Schwarber becomes 1st player to 20 HRs, making Phils history along the way
Analyzing potential Mets starting pitching replacements following Clay Holmes injury
news_items.summary: Clay Holmes will be out for "a long time," and the Mets need to replace his production in the rotation. Taking a look at some alternatives from a well of depth that is quickly running out.

news_items.headline: Kurtz Blasts the A’s to a 5-2 Victory Over the Giants
Mariners fall behind, get chased down by Mason Miller in 2-0 loss
news_items.summary: Emerson Hancock pitches well again, but gets no support, again

news_items.headline: Dodgers lean on three homers and eight pitchers to end losing streak vs. Angels
news_items.summary: Andy Pages, Max Muncy and Teoscar Hernández each hit home runs as the Dodgers end their seven-game losing streak against the Angels in a 6-0 win.

news_items.headline: Subway Series opener, loss of Clay Holmes exemplifies dichotomy of Mets-Yankees seasons
news_items.summary: The Mets came into Friday's opener with the Yankees with a chance to continue their winning ways, but the Amazin's lost more than just the game as Clay Holmes will be down for a while with a fractured fibula.

news_items.headline: Cubs snap out of offensive funk, take Crosstown Classic opener from White Sox
